name: codex-goal-control
description: Open a local goal panel and manage the current Codex thread goal.

interface.shortDescription: Open and control the current Codex thread goal.
interface.longDescription: Codex Goal Control provides a local goal panel plus direct helpers for inspecting, setting, pausing, resuming, completing, and clearing the current Codex thread goal.
defaultPrompt: Open the goal panel for this thread.
Set a goal for this Codex thread.
